Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
Single HTML build
Educational Checkpoint
Question goes here
Correct answers add 50 points, plus 10 more for each consecutive correct answer. After you answer, the game will resume automatically in a moment.
Click inside the game, then use your keyboard. If the game does not start when opened directly from your computer, run it through a simple local web server so the browser can load emulator assets correctly.
Enemy defeats: 0
Defeats to next question: 5
Questions used: 0
Because this file is a browser wrapper around the original ROM, the quiz system now triggers automatically every 20 seconds after the third Enter press during startup. The emulator pauses, a multiple-choice question appears, then it resumes automatically after you answer. You can also click Test Question to confirm the popup is working.
Total quiz score: 0
Questions answered: 0
Quiz streak: 0
This wrapper reliably tracks quiz bonus points, questions answered, and your current correct-answer streak.

How to play

This page contains the Genesis ROM embedded directly into one HTML file. The emulator engine is loaded from EmulatorJS.

Keyboard controls

  • Arrow keys: Move
  • Z / A: Button B or A depending on mapping
  • X / S: Button C or B depending on mapping
  • Enter: Start
  • Shift: Select or menu function

Important

  • This is a browser wrapper around your ROM, not a native conversion.
  • Internet is required the first time because the emulator loader comes from a CDN.
  • If your browser blocks local file execution, use a tiny local server.
Best use: place this file in a folder and open it in Chrome or Edge. If direct double-click loading fails, start a simple local server in that folder and open the local address in your browser.
Server tip: in the folder with this HTML file, run python -m http.server 8000 and open http://localhost:8000.
